updates.note: The BJP state government announced its decision to double the monthly old-age pension and disability pension from ₹1,000 to ₹2,000 per month. Sources indicate the revised amount is likely to be effective from June 1, 2026. Senior citizens above the age of 60 were previously receiving ₹1,000 per month under the state's social assistance scheme. ↗ Ananda Bazar Patrika | May 13, 2026
